name: Truv
description: Consumer-permissioned payroll and income/employment data API for lenders and banks.

seo.title: Truv — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Truv: Consumer-permissioned payroll and income/employment data API for lenders and banks.

when_to_use: Consumer-permissioned payroll data for mortgage lenders
Employment and income verification via payroll API for banks
Direct deposit switching for financial wellness apps
Replacing VOE/VOI paper processes with API-based verification
Real-time payroll data for underwriting and credit decisions

pros: Direct payroll connections bypass document uploads
Faster income verification than The Work Number
Cheaper than Equifax for lender use cases
cons: Coverage depends on payroll provider support
Fallback flows still needed for gig/1099 workers
Smaller brand than Plaid or Equifax in lending
Some employer payroll systems reject automation
review.verdict: Credible challenger to The Work Number for income verification, though coverage gaps still force fallback flows.
review.best_for: Lenders and banks cutting verification costs and loan approval times
review.not_for: Verifying income for gig workers or self-employed borrowers at scale
